programme.title: Drive Back Home

The two men are then forced to drive back home together at the behest of their hard-nosed mother before they kill each other.

The undead killer soon embarks on a bloody rampage to retrieve the stolen locket, methodically slaughtering anyone who gets in his way.

Optimus Prime believes that resurrecting ancient Transformer Sentinel Prime, once the leader of the Autobots, may lead to victory. That decision, however, has devastating consequences. The war appears to tip in favor of the Decepticons, leading to a climactic battl

programme.title: Out Standing
programme.desc: Officer Sandra Perron resigns from the Canadian military after a controversial photo surfaces. Adapting to civilian life amidst an investigation, she denies abuse allegations despite evidence suggesting mistreatment within her unit.

programme.title: It Comes in Waves
programme.desc: After fleeing Rwanda's horrors, a family of four starts anew in Ottawa, Canada, where they face unexpected challenges and harsh realities in their pursuit of a better life.

programme.title: Cold Road
programme.desc: On a frozen remote highway in the Canadian North, an Indigenous woman and her dog are hunted by a stranger in a semi truck.

programme.title: Deaner '89
programme.desc: Hard-luck metalhead Dean Murdoch reveals how he finally made it, journeying back to the '80s, when being a hockey jock was a badge of honour, Jazzercise was a national movement, seatbelts were optional, and teachers were as drunk as their students.

programme.title: The Players
programme.desc: Summer. 1994. Emily is cast as the youngest member of an avant garde theatre production. She is immediately entranced by the bohemian lives of her fellow actors and feels like she has found a surrogate family, but as the lines between artistic and personal relationships blur, Emily becomes trapped in the complex power dynamics within the group.

programme.title: White Noise
programme.desc: Ava's debilitating hyper-sensitivity to sound is becoming unliveable. When an attempt at suicide fails, she pleads with her doctor to enrol her in an experimental trial involving an anechoic chamber: the world's quietest room.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Corner Gas goes through a business boom after Hank comes up with an idea to increase tourism.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: A cable guy visits Dog River to help produce some local access programming but the town isn't quite ready for prime time; Brent is selected to choose which idea will be produced.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash helps Mags with a favor and navigates a challenge with Karim.

programme.title: Rush for Your Life
programme.desc: Journalism student Tasha goes under cover as a sorority pledge to expose the people responsible for the death of a student the prior year. She quickly finds herself completing dangerous hazing rituals to secure a spot in the sorority.

programme.title: Night of the Zoopocalypse
programme.desc: When a meteor unleashes a virus that turns zoo animals into zombies, a mountain lion and a wolf lead a team of survivors to save the day.

programme.title: Selena + Chef
programme.desc: Artist, activist, and chef DeVonn Francis guides Selena through his version of an elevated banana-inspired Jamaican meal, including a torched banana cake and banana leaf roasted snapper.

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: Friendship and courage take center stage when Charlie and his friends stumble upon the headquarters of the Guard and realize the world's most powerful superhero is Charlie's dad. When an evil businessman sends in a team to infiltrate the lair and retrieve the Guard's energy source, the youngsters spring into action and turn the tables on the intruders.

programme.title: White Bird: A Wonder Story
programme.desc: Julian has struggled to belong ever since he was expelled from his former school for his treatment of Auggie Pullman. To transform his life, Julian's grandmother finally reveals her own story of courage. During her youth in Nazi-occupied France, a boy shelters her from mortal danger. Together, they find first love in a stunning, magical world of their own creation, while the boy's mother risks eve

programme.title: No One Will Save You
programme.desc: Brynn finds solace within the walls of the home where she grew up until she's awakened one night by strange noises from unearthly intruders.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Reclusive author Loretta Sage writes about exotic places in her popular adventure novels that feature a handsome cover model named Alan. While on tour promoting her new book with Alan, Loretta gets kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire who hopes she can lead him to an ancient city's lost treasure from her latest story. Determined to prove he can be a hero in real life and not just on the pages of

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: The duo returns to the Palmetto to reclaim their territory.

programme.title: Oh, Hi!
programme.desc: Iris is enjoying her first romantic getaway with Isaac, until he tells her he's not interested in a serious relationship.

programme.title: Border Hunters
programme.desc: In Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, a fentanyl overdose claims the lives of an American youth and a paramedic, drawing the U.S. ambassador into a desperate mission to dismantle the cartels. When former spy Abraham Woodhill enlists imprisoned ex-operative Jake Byrne, a violent, high-stakes game unfolds across jungles, villages and cartel strongholds.

programme.title: Drive Back Home
programme.desc: In the winter of 1970, a cantankerous, small town plumber from rural New Brunswick, must drive his beat-up work truck 1000 miles to Toronto to get his estranged, gay brother out of jail after being arrested for having sex in a public park. The two men are then forced to drive back home together at the behest of their hard-nosed mother before they kill each other.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Noah and Megan find a long-buried corpse in their parents' basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating web of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

programme.title: In a Violent Nature
programme.desc: When a group of teens takes a locket from a collapsed fire tower in the woods, they unwittingly resurrect the rotting corpse of Johnny, a vengeful spirit spurred on by a horrific 60-year-old crime. The undead killer soon embarks on a bloody rampage to retrieve the stolen locket, methodically slaughtering anyone who gets in his way.

programme.title: Paseo
programme.desc: A woman becomes displaced and alienated by her surroundings while traveling through Spain. She begins to lose control of her emotional and psychological self as she explores another possible life.

programme.title: A Zest for Death: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah Swensen is determined to get to the bottom of the mystery after her mother finds the dead body of a homeowner, and frequent patron of The Cookie Jar, while house-hunting for her sister Michelle.

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie's residency gets off to a rocky start as Cal shows Ben the ropes at the Crossing and begins to wonder if Liam has any intention of leaving.
Despite the case being closed, Bobby is determined to prove his Alcoholics Anonymous sponsor was murdered and bring his killer to justice; Buck struggles with his post-traumatic stress.
Athena and the 118 race to the rescue when a fading movie star is plagued by a series of near-death experiences.

The 118 race to the rescue to a renaissance faire; an overbearing boss is poisoned; Athena fears for May's life when she encounters a disturbed young man; Uncle Buck babysits young Jee-Yun as Maddie and Chimney begin house-hunting.

The Santa Ana winds bring in a variety of weirder-than-usual emergencies; a family dog retrieves a severed hand; a young woman sleep-drives into the station; Denny questions Hen and Karen about his biological parents.

A dry thunderstorm rolls over Los Angeles, bringing in a series of lightning strike emergencies for the 118 and leaves a first responder's life hanging in the balance; Chimney get a surprise from a visiting Albert.
As Buck's life hangs in the balance, he dreams of a world where he never became a firefighter, for better and worse.

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie's residency gets off to a rocky start as Cal shows Ben the ropes at the Crossing and begins to wonder if Liam has any intention of leaving.
